zh.lifeSummary: 當Grace Barentyne於大約1393年出生在英國英格蘭素可斯勞加姆時，她的父親John Barentyne13歲，母親Thomasine Tothamn21歲。她與William Covert結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。她去世於1439年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Grace Barentyne于大约1393年出生在英国英格兰素可斯勞加姆时，她的父亲John Barentyne13岁，母亲Thomasine Tothamn21岁。她与William Covert结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。她去世于1439年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Barentyne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Ballentine
meanings: Scottish: habitational name, probably from the lands of Bellenden, now Bellendean, on Ale Water west of Roberton in Roxburghshire. John Ballantyne, archdeacon of Moray 1533–38, was also recorded as John Ballentyne or Bellenden. It has been suggested that the placename is from Gaelic baile an deadhain ‘the dean's farm’, which leaves open the possibility of more than one geographical origin (there is also a place called Bellenden in Selkirk); the surname is persistently associated with Falkirk and Edinburgh as well as Roxburghshire. The origin of the variation between -d- and -t-, if genuine, is unknown.

nameMeanings.name: Grace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the abstract noun (via Old French, from Latin gratia), this name occurs occasionally in the 15th century, and by the 1540s was among the most popular girls' names in some parishes. It has always been particularly popular in Scotland and northern England (borne, for example, by Grace Darling , the lighthouse keeper's daughter whose heroism in 1838 , saving sailors in a storm, caught the popular imagination). In more recent times it was famous as the name of the actress Grace Kelly ( 1928–82 ), who became Princess Grace of Monaco. In Ireland it is used as an Anglicized form of Gráinne .

en.lifeSummary: When Grace Barentyne was born about 1393, in Slaugham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Barentyne, was 13 and her mother, Thomasine Tothamn, was 21. She married William Covert. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. She died after 1439.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Grace Barentyne est née environ 1393, à Slaugham, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Barentyne, avait 13 ans et sa mère, Thomasine Tothamn, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé William Covert. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Elle est décédée après 1439.

de.lifeSummary: Als Grace Barentyne um 1393 in Slaugham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Barentyne 13 und ihre Mutter Thomasine Tothamn 21. Sie hat William Covert geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Sie starb nach 1439.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Grace Barentyne è nata il circa 1393 nel Slaugham, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Barentyne, aveva 13 anni e sua madre, Thomasine Tothamn, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato William Covert. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì dopo il 1439.

ko.lifeSummary: Grace Barentyne(이)가 대략 1393년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 슬로그함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Barentyne(은)는 13세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Thomasine Tothamn(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 William Covert(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1439년 이후 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Grace Barentyne родилась около 1393 г. в местности слоам, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Barentyne было 13 лет, а матери, которую звали Thomasine Tothamn, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Covert. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Она умерла после 1439 г.
